General.Name: Xuan Wu Cloud Tech Hldg Ltd
General.Description: Xuan Wu Cloud Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides intelligent customer relationship management (CRM) services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through CRM PaaS Services and CRM SaaS Services segments. The company offers communication platform as a service to encapsulate messaging communication capabilities of major telecommunication network operators for enabling the customers to access and utilize the communication capabilities as a service; and CRM SaaS services that provide marketing cloud, sales cloud, and service cloud, which provides the customer with one-stop intelligent CRM services through business cycle from initial marketing to after-sales services. It also engages in the undertaking of code numbers and procurement of channel resources from operators; and provision of voice and video communication capabilities. The company serves companies in the mass consumption; finance; technology, media, and telecom; and government-related industries. Xuan Wu Cloud Technology Holdings Limited was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.

3.Name: Ms. Ping  Ge
3.Title: Senior VP, CFO & Joint Company Secretary
